title: GroceryDB Expository Visualization
description: A finished DSC 106 data story comparing how ultra-processed product mixes change across Whole Foods, Target, and Walmart categories.

title: GroceryDB Checkpoint Analysis
description: An earlier checkpoint exploration that tested heatmaps and category-level comparisons before the final GroceryDB visual story.

title: Project 2 Persuasive Visualization Scaffold
description: A reusable checkpoint scaffold for assembling persuasive and deceptive visualization drafts into the required three-page submission format.

title: Semantic Visions Signal Explorer
description: A concept for surfacing entity mentions, event spikes, and evolving topic clusters across large multilingual news datasets.

title: CRS vs Sepsis Modeling Pipeline
description: An AI workflow for distinguishing cytokine release syndrome from sepsis using OMOP electronic health record data and temporal clinical features.

title: Clinical Outcomes Dashboard
description: A dashboard concept for tracking patient cohorts, treatment response, and key risk markers across longitudinal healthcare data.

title: Startup Ops Snapshot
description: A reporting surface for reviewing campaign pacing, operational metrics, and sales activity in one concise weekly view.

title: Campus Mobility Explorer
description: A prototype map and filtering interface for understanding how students move among housing, classrooms, and transit stops.

title: Nutrition Pattern Cards
description: A responsive set of small multiples designed to compare meals, macro balance, and consistency across days and goals.

title: Personal Finance Simulator
description: A sandbox for comparing saving, investing, and budgeting strategies under adjustable assumptions and market conditions.

title: Founder Workflow Board
description: A lightweight board for balancing product decisions, research tasks, and execution milestones while running multiple ideas at once.

title: Encrypted Exchange Concept
description: An early startup concept exploring a physical cryptocurrency exchange experience built around gift cards and delegated operations.
